edition.dagbeeld: De Amerikaanse aanvallen op Iran gaan een derde nacht door terwijl Trump het Hormuz-bestand opblaast en een nieuwe blokkade aankondigt — het conflict escaleert sneller dan diplomaten bij kunnen houden. Ondertussen bouwt Europa aan zijn eigen militaire architectuur, met Oekraïne als spil, terwijl Rusland cyberaanvallen op de westerse infrastructuur blijft uitvoeren.

article.title: US launches third night of strikes on Iran as Trump announces Hormuz blockade
article.summary: American president says ships will be charged for safe passage through strait in apparent policy reversal

opening.note: Derde nacht VS-aanvallen op Iran, Trump kondigt nieuwe Hormuz-blokkade aan met toltarief.
opening.label: breaking

article.title: Donald Trump’s Needless War with Iran Is His Biggest Economic Blunder
article.summary: As the midterm elections approach, gas prices have started to rise again, and the President’s poll ratings are in the cellar.

article.title: UK police reverse course, launch terror probe into killing of ex-MP Ann Widdecombe
article.summary: Days after saying there was no evidence of terrorism, British authorities say new information has led counter-terrorism officers to take over the investigation into the killing of the former Conservative minister.

article.title: Inside ICE’s Largest Detention Center
article.summary: On a military base in West Texas, where the government has built a sprawling tent complex to hold thousands of immigrants, deprivation and dire conditions are part of the design.

article.title: Russia's FSB blamed for Poland grid attack as UK and EU impose first joint cyber sanctions
article.summary: The allies blamed Center 16, the FSB’s signals intelligence arm, for acts of attempted cyber sabotage targeting Poland’s energy sector and water treatment facilities, alongside “a wide range of malicious cyber activities with growing severity.”
